{{Quote|Roughly two hours after the starfighters were redeployed, the Alliance sensor net detected the launch of a number of Imperial probe droids from an Imperial Star Destroyer (possibly the ''Unrepentant''). The Star Destroyer jumped to hyperspace before it could be engaged.|[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]|<ref name="TABSB" />}}
The '''''Unrepentant''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] that served in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]].

==History==
Following the victory of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] over the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Rebels, on high alert, continued repairing their [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in the vicinity of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. After Alliance [[Picket ship/Legends|picket ships]] detected Imperial [[Patrol ship/Legends|system patrol craft]] nearby, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] redeployed Rebel [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] sentry lines away from the bulk of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Fleet]].<ref name="TABSB" />

Two [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] after this redeployment, an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] launched<ref name="TABSB" /> an unconfirmed number<ref name="GG5">[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi'', Second Edition]]</ref> of [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] into the [[Endor system/Legends|Endor system]]. The [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] then jumped to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] before it could be engaged by Alliance forces. This ship was identified as the ''Unrepentant'' by various individuals within the Alliance: tentatively so by [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]<ref name="TABSB" /> and [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Bren Derlin/Legends|Bren Derlin]],<ref name="GG5" /> and with more certainty by Major [[Breslin Drake]] of [[Alliance Intelligence/Legends|Alliance Intelligence]]. For Admiral Ackbar, the appearance of a Star Destroyer confirmed that Imperial forces were still in the area. Alliance starfighters swept the area for the deployed probe [[Droid/Legends|droids]] and were believed to have destroyed them all, though several of the fighters were damaged by the droid's weaponry. Major Drake determined that the ''Unrepentant''{{'s}} probe droids were unsuccessful in ascertaining the deployment of the Rebel fleet, as only a small minority of them were able to transmit any data back to the Imperial [[Battle group/Legends|battle group]] regrouping in the [[Annaj system/Legends|Annaj system]], and the data that they were able to transmit was contradictory.<ref name="TABSB" />

*<!-- 1995-XX-XX -->[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi'', Second Edition]]
